name: Liquid Death
description: Punk-rock canned water, teas, and sparkling that turns hydration into a lifestyle brand.

name: Quantum Energy Squares
description: Caffeine and protein snacks that slot perfectly at checkout and grab-and-go sections.

name: The Frozen Bean
description: Cafe-style frappe and latte drink mixes that boost margins, speed service, and satisfy repeat cravings.

name: Catalina Snacks
description: Better-for-you cereal and snacks that merchandises like indulgence but sells like wellness.

name: San Miguel
description: Modern Mexican staples designed for "real food, real fast" convenience with authentic flavor shoppers recognize.

name: Rip Van
description: Low-sugar, high-fiber snacks (wafels, wafers, cookies) that hits the "better treat" sweet spot without feeling niche.

name: Whoa Dough
description: Plant-based, gluten-free snack bars that feel like dessert but fit better-for-you planograms and lunchbox demand.

name: Palermo's
description: Big, craveable frozen pizzas from a family company, designed for high-visibility merchandising and reliable demand.

name: BeanVivo
description: Bean-powered, high-protein pouches and snack mixes that make plant protein easy.

name: SuckerPunch Gourmet
description: Bold-flavor pickles, snacks and juice shots that punch up sandwiches, charcuterie, and athletic recovery sets.

Bold Burger Kosher Dill Pickle Chips

name: Blake's Seed Based
description: Seed-based snacks that deliver the classic bar and crispy-treat experience with broad household appeal.

name: Joolies
description: Fresh organic Medjool dates with sustainable packaging, a premium "nature's candy" play for produce and snack aisles.

name: Positive Beverage
description: Clean-ingredient functional hydration with electrolytes and vitamins that reads "daily wellness" while playing in sports and convenience.

name: That's It Nutrition
description: Ultra-simple fruit snacks and bars made with plant-based ingredients for kids, travel, and checkout racks.
